name: HoneyLand
short_description: Help Mr.Fluff to drink all the honey, and of course, reach the fabulous honey volcano! Your cards will direct Mr. Fluff in the right direction. Run! Jump! Fall on your stomach!
detailed_description:
HoneyLand, a charming puzzle with turn-based strategy.

Help Mr. Fluff to drink all the honey from HoneyLand!

Discover HoneyLand, a wonderful and alive island.
A paradise where the greatest honey worshipers seek to feel satisfied and happy.

Who else could show up here? Yes, Mr. Fluff, a naive bear with a monstrous appetite.

Help Mr.Fluff to drink all the honey, and of course, reach the fabulous honey volcano!

Featuring:

  • 30 hand-crafted levels with increasing complexity;
  • Go through 3 different environments;
  • Use 2 types of cards to put Mr. Fluff into action

You will start each map with a fixed amount of cards that will target MR. Fluff the right way to the honey pot.

When using a card, it will be consumed and direct the character to the desired path.

Your cards will direct Mr. Fluff in the right direction. Run! Jump! Fall on your stomach!
